description_long: This object is a desktop condenser microphone, resembling the Blue Yeti model, designed for high-quality audio recording. It features a cylindrical body with a rounded mesh grille at the top, which serves as the microphone capsule cover. The body is mounted on a sturdy, circular metal base with a U-shaped yoke that allows the microphone to pivot for optimal positioning. On the front, there is a prominent brand logo and a control knob, while the rear side has additional buttons and dials for adjusting settings such as gain and pickup pattern. The sides of the microphone display metallic adjustment knobs for tilting the microphone angle. The overall finish is a combination of matte and glossy metallic surfaces, giving it a professional and robust appearance.
description: A professional desktop condenser microphone with a rounded mesh grille, metallic body, and adjustable yoke stand, featuring control knobs and a prominent brand logo.
description_view_0: Front view showing the mesh grille, brand logo, and a central control knob on the body.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the metallic yoke, adjustment knob, and the microphone's cylindrical shape.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying two control buttons and the back of the yoke, with the mesh grille visible at the top.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view showing the other adjustment knob and the microphone's robust stand.
